title: 'ozen #0241
definition:
1) ear, as part of the body
 2) ear, as organ of hearing
 3) (subjective) to uncover the ear to reveal; the receiver of
    divine revelation
nasbUsage:

 2) ear, as organ of hearing
 3) (subjective) to uncover the ear to reveal; the receiver of
    divine revelation

    NASB:  an ear
